sidebarAds.canModifyAdContent: You can now modify the content of ad space #{{id}}
sidebarAds.targetContentCidPlaceholder: Content CID to navigate to when ad is clicked
sidebarAds.updateGasOnly: Updating ad content requires no additional fees, only gas fees.
sidebarAds.bidSuccessHint: After a successful bid, you will become the new ad space owner and can update the ad content.
sidebarAds.fillRequiredImageTitle: Please fill in required fields (Image CID and Title)
sidebarAds.bidTooLow: Bid cannot be lower than {{min}} FIL
sidebarAds.bidExpiredCannotModify: Bid period has expired. Cannot modify ad content. Please re-bid for this ad space.
sidebarAds.rulesA1: Ad spaces are on-chain slots that anyone can bid on to display their content in the sidebar. Each ad space shows a work from the creator's content library.
sidebarAds.rulesQ2: How do I get an ad space?
sidebarAds.rulesA2: Place a bid with FIL. The minimum first bid is 80% of the current price (or the current market value during a depreciation period). To outbid someone, you need to bid at least 10% more than the current highest bid.
sidebarAds.rulesA3: Your funds are immediately returned to your pending withdrawals balance. You can call withdraw() at any time to get them back — they are never locked.
sidebarAds.rulesQ4: I won the auction — what's next?
sidebarAds.rulesA4: After the auction ends, you have a 24-hour window to update the ad content. If you miss this window, anyone can force-settle the ad and you'll lose 10% of your bid as a penalty.
sidebarAds.rulesA5: Your bid goes to the previous owner (their original price + 80% of any profit). The ad group creator receives 20% of the profit. If you settle late, 10% goes to the platform as a penalty.
sidebarAds.rulesQ6: What if nobody bids on an ad space?
sidebarAds.rulesA6: The ad space value depreciates by 20% every 24 hours after the protection period ends, down to a minimum of 1 FIL. This creates a bargain opportunity for new bidders.
sidebarAds.rulesQ7: How do I collect my earnings?
sidebarAds.rulesA7: All earnings (refunds, settlement payouts) accumulate in your pending withdrawals balance on-chain. You need to manually call withdraw() to transfer them to your wallet.

topAdBanner.title: Creator Jackpot
topAdBanner.rulesQ1: How is the jackpot pool funded?
topAdBanner.rulesA1: Every tip is split three ways: 90% goes to the creator, 1% to the platform, and 9% directly into the jackpot pool. The pool grows continuously as users tip content.
topAdBanner.rulesQ2: How does the jackpot draw work?
topAdBanner.rulesA2: Each pool runs a 7-day cycle. When the cycle ends, the creator whose single work accumulated the highest total tips in that cycle wins the entire pool. If no one has tipped during the cycle, the pool rolls over to the next round.
topAdBanner.rulesQ3: How does the competitive bidding (leader change) work?
topAdBanner.rulesA3: To dethrone the current leader, a work must accumulate tips that exceed the leader's total by at least 5%. Simply tipping more than the leader is not enough — you need a 5% margin to take the top spot.
topAdBanner.rulesQ4: What is the settlement delay rule?
topAdBanner.rulesA4: To prevent last-second sniping, if a new leader emerges within the final 30 minutes of a cycle, the deadline is automatically extended by 30 minutes. Extensions are capped at one per 5 minutes, giving the previous leader a fair chance to respond.
topAdBanner.rulesQ5: What is the winner cooldown rule?
topAdBanner.rulesA5: After winning a jackpot, the winner's address is barred from competing for the top spot for the next 3 full cycles. Their tips still count toward the pool, but they cannot become the leader during the cooldown period.
topAdBanner.rulesQ6: How do I claim my prize?
topAdBanner.rulesA6: After the cycle ends, click the "Claim" button on the banner. This calls settleJackpot() on-chain, which transfers the pool to your balance. You can then withdraw it at any time from the Withdraw page.
topAdBanner.rulesQ7: Are there separate pools for different tokens?
topAdBanner.rulesA7: Yes. Each supported token (e.g. FIL, USDFC) has its own independent jackpot pool and leaderboard. Tips in FIL compete only in the FIL pool, and tips in USDFC compete only in the USDFC pool.

dhtTooltip.content:
DHT (Distributed Hash Table) Mode:

• Client Mode (Recommended): Node only queries the DHT network without participating in routing. Suitable for regular users, low resource usage, better privacy.

• Server Mode: Node participates in DHT routing to help other nodes discover content. Requires a public IP, exposes your IP address. Suitable for advanced users with a fixed public IP.

usdfcExchange.rulesWhatIsDesc: A Trove is a collateralized debt position based on the Liquity protocol. Users can deposit FIL as collateral to borrow USDFC stablecoin. The system ensures USDFC value stability through over-collateralization and liquidation mechanisms.
usdfcExchange.rulesBorrow1: Deposit FIL as collateral to borrow USDFC stablecoin
usdfcExchange.rulesBorrow2: Minimum collateral ratio 110%, recommended 150%+ to reduce liquidation risk
usdfcExchange.rulesBorrow3: Minimum debt 200 USDFC (excluding reserve and fees)
usdfcExchange.rulesBorrow4: One-time borrowing fee of 0.5% plus 20 USDFC liquidation reserve
usdfcExchange.rulesRedeem1: Partial redemption: Repay some USDFC, withdraw some FIL, must maintain ratio ≥ 110%
usdfcExchange.rulesRedeem2: Full redemption: Repay all debt, close Trove, withdraw all collateral
usdfcExchange.rulesRedeem3: 20 USDFC liquidation reserve will be refunded when closing Trove
usdfcExchange.rulesLiquidation1: Trove will be liquidated when collateral ratio falls below 110%
usdfcExchange.rulesLiquidation2: During liquidation, collateral is used to repay debt, may lose partial or all collateral
usdfcExchange.rulesLiquidation3: Recommended to maintain ratio above 150% to avoid liquidation from FIL price volatility
usdfcExchange.rulesRisk1: FIL price volatility may cause collateral ratio to drop, monitor closely
usdfcExchange.rulesRisk2: Liquidation causes asset loss, maintain higher collateral ratio recommended
usdfcExchange.rulesRisk3: Borrowing and redemption require gas fees, ensure sufficient FIL in wallet
usdfcExchange.openNote1: Minimum debt is 200 USDFC (excluding 20 USDFC reserve and borrowing fee)
usdfcExchange.adjustNote1: Can add more collateral or borrow more USDFC, must maintain ratio above 110%
usdfcExchange.closeNote1: Requires sufficient USDFC balance to repay debt
usdfcExchange.closeNote2: 20 USDFC liquidation reserve will be refunded
usdfcExchange.closeNote3: All collateral FIL will be returned
